vllm.title: [Bugfix] Added `embed_is_patch` mask for fuyu model
vllm.author: kylehh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Address issue #15144 for Fuyu model.
Added embed_is_patch mask in the format of torch.tensor(([True] * ncols + [False]) * nrows) ( Fuyu had newline for each row according to this)

vllm.title: fix: Comments to English for better dev experience
vllm.author: yihong0618

vllm.title: [V1][Scheduler] Avoid calling `_try_schedule_encoder_inputs` for every request
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, we call _try_schedule_encoder_inputs for every request and every step.
This PR avoids this function call by only calling it when the request includes encoder inputs (e.g., images).
